name: atlarium-mcp
description: Public read-only MCP server for structured aquarium, marine, terrarium and paludarium habitat data.

scripts.mcp:conformance: pnpm mcp:conformance:core && pnpm mcp:conformance:tools && pnpm mcp:conformance:dns
scripts.mcp:conformance:core: npx @modelcontextprotocol/conformance server --url http://localhost:43118/mcp --scenario server-initialize && npx @modelcontextprotocol/conformance server --url http://localhost:43118/mcp --scenario logging-set-level && npx @modelcontextprotocol/conformance server --url http://localhost:43118/mcp --scenario ping
scripts.mcp:conformance:tools: npx @modelcontextprotocol/conformance server --url http://localhost:43118/mcp --scenario tools-list && npx @modelcontextprotocol/conformance server --url http://localhost:43118/mcp --scenario tools-call-simple-text && npx @modelcontextprotocol/conformance server --url http://localhost:43118/mcp --scenario tools-call-error
scripts.mcp:conformance:public: npx @modelcontextprotocol/conformance server --url https://mcp.atlarium.bio/mcp --scenario server-initialize && npx @modelcontextprotocol/conformance server --url https://mcp.atlarium.bio/mcp --scenario ping && npx @modelcontextprotocol/conformance server --url https://mcp.atlarium.bio/mcp --scenario tools-list
